evals.prompt: Analyze these research findings on the European EV market and stress-test the recommendation to enter
evals.expected_output: An Analysis Report with MAP scoring, verification questions, pre-mortem, and reality check
expectations: A triage score is calculated (stakes x complexity x time x info quality)
MAP scoring table with 4-8 dimensions and confidence scores
At least 5 verification questions targeting assumptions
Pre-mortem with at least 5 failure modes and prevention measures
Reality check comparing expected outcome against base rates
A recommendation with key conditions and confidence level
